product: British English Academy Early Years Interactive Learning Engine
release_status: final developer-ready deployment contract; requires implementation against supplied API/database/schema pack
copyright_safety: Original BEA activity and algorithm specification benchmarked to common early-years edtech patterns; no proprietary Starfall or SplashLearn content is copied.

preferred_terms.grade_label: year/grade band display configurable; retain Pre-K to Grade 3 internally for Pennsylvania mapping

learner_feedback_strings.try_again: Try again. Listen carefully and choose one answer.
learner_feedback_strings.mini_teach_intro: Let us practise this sound together first.
learner_feedback_strings.success: Well done. You are ready for the next challenge.
learner_feedback_strings.teacher_review: Your teacher will give you one short practice activity.

relationships: teacher has many classes and groups
group has many learners and assignments
learner has many sessions, attempts, mastery_evidence and recommendations
activity has many activity_versions and items
assignment targets a learner, group or class and references one or more activities, strands or skills
dashboard_event is emitted by sessions, attempts, assignments and mastery changes

canonical_signals.name: diagnostic_score
canonical_signals.definition: Placement score. If absent, calculate round(accuracy * 100).

aggregate_signals.name: rolling_accuracy
aggregate_signals.source: last N attempts or session aggregate

diagnostic_event.normalisation_rule: If diagnostic_score is absent, calculate diagnostic_score = round(accuracy * 100). Accuracy remains decimal 0.00-1.00.

attempt_event.error_rule: Use exactly one primary error_type value from skill_model.error_type_enum when an error is classified; use null when the answer is correct or no error classification is available.

api_endpoints.purpose: Return adaptive pathway and next recommended activities
Submit diagnostic result and return placement route
Create a game session with activity version and item seed
Log item attempt with canonical telemetry signals
Calculate mastery, rewards, next route and dashboard events
Return class skill heatmap by mastery and intervention need
Return learners and current early-years skill status for a class
Create group-level intervention or extension assignment
Create or update teacher-managed intervention groups
Return teacher assignment queue and completion status
Return parent-friendly progress and home practice guidance
Return canonical telemetry signatures and error_type enum
Return content coverage by grade, subject, strand, skill and activity

phonological_awareness.incorrect_first: Play short scaffold for phonological awareness and replay the target prompt.
phonological_awareness.incorrect_repeat: Launch mini-teach card for phonological awareness and serve a parallel item.
phonological_awareness.teacher_follow_up: Queue small-group card mapped to phonological awareness.
phonological_awareness.parent_home_practice: Generate one 3-minute home activity for phonological awareness.

fallback_intervention.incorrect_first: Replay the prompt with one visual scaffold.
fallback_intervention.incorrect_repeat: Show a short mini-teach, then serve a parallel item.
fallback_intervention.teacher_follow_up: Queue teacher review if the learner repeats the same barrier in the next session.

validation_rules: CSV activity bank must use activity_id as a unique stable identifier.
All adaptive rules must reference only skill_model.evidence_signals or skill_model.aggregate_signals.
All assignment and session endpoints must carry the target resource identifier in the URL path.
Feedback intervention must resolve by feedback.interventions_by_error_type[error_type] first, then fallback_intervention.
Learner-facing strings must use en-GB defaults unless a tenant-level locale override is configured.
